scripts.db:generate: cd packages/db && dotenv -e ../../apps/api/.env -- bunx drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/db && dotenv -e ../../apps/api/.env -- bunx drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:migrate-prod: cd packages/db && npx dotenv -e ../../apps/api/.env.prod -- bunx drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:generate-prod: cd packages/db && dotenv -e ../../apps/api/.env.prod -- bunx drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate:dev: bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:prod: bun run db:generate-prod && bun run db:migrate-prod
scripts.db:studio: cd packages/db && dotenv -e ../../apps/api/.env -- bunx drizzle-kit studio
scripts.db:studio:prod: cd packages/db && dotenv -e ../../apps/api/.env.prod -- bunx drizzle-kit studio
